entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Salesforce_Plan_Compilation Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ProvisioningProject PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ProvisioningProject identity="Amanda Ross"> <ExpansionItems> <ExpansionItem application="IIQ" cause="Role" name="Capabilities" operation="Retain" sourceInfo="IT2ADEngineering" value="SyslogAdministrator"/> <ExpansionItem application="SalesForceApp" cause="ProvisioningPolicy" name="CommunityNickname" operation="Set" sourceInfo="SalesForceApp" value="Amanda Ross"/> </ExpansionItems> <MasterPlan> <ProvisioningPlan> <AccountRequest application="SalesForceApp" op="Create"/> </ProvisioningPlan> </MasterPlan> <ProvisioningPlan targetIntegration="LDAPApplication" trackingId="2b474f1235ee4b0880848d2cb536259d"/> <ProvisioningPlan targetIntegration="ActiveDirectory" trackingId="f01da3b0de694e3f84d92cfe73460579"/> <ProvisioningPlan targetIntegration="SalesForceApp" trackingId="6031123d15c9469f84255bb835333ec8"> <AccountRequest application="SalesForceApp" op="Create"> <AttributeRequest name="CommunityNickname" op="Set" value="Amanda Ross"/> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan> <ProvisioningPlan targetIntegration="IIQ" trackingId="e4f88ec5463d4c569c509c2a74224242"> <AccountRequest application="IIQ"> <AttributeRequest name="Capabilities" op="Retain"> <Value> <List> <String>SyslogAdministrator</String> </List> </Value> </AttributeRequest> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan> <ProvisioningTarget assignmentId="87260ad56ff64360b8b8d19da75c49b3" retain="true" role="IT2ADEngineering"> <AccountSelection applicationId="ActiveDirectory" applicationName="ActiveDirectory" selection="CN=Amanda Ross,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <AccountInfo displayName="Amanda Ross" nativeIdentity="CN=Amanda Ross,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> </AccountSelection> </ProvisioningTarget> <Questions> <Question attributeName="Alias" source="SalesForceApp" type="Application"> <Field application="SalesForceApp" displayName="con_prov_policy_salesforce_direct_Alias" name="Question:0:Alias" priority="10" required="true" reviewRequired="true" section="SalesForceApp" template="account" type="string" value="ARoss"/> </Question> <Question attributeName="IsActive" source="SalesForceApp" type="Application"> <Field application="SalesForceApp" displayName="con_prov_policy_salesforce_direct_Active" name="Question:1:IsActive" priority="10" reviewRequired="true" section="SalesForceApp" template="account" type="boolean"/> </Question> <Question attributeName="Username" source="SalesForceApp" type="Application"> <Field application="SalesForceApp" displayName="con_prov_policy_salesforce_direct_Username" helpKey="help_prov_policy_salesforce_direct_Username" name="Question:2:Username" priority="10" required="true" reviewRequired="true" section="SalesForceApp" template="account" type="string" value="Amanda.Ross@eshiam.com"/> </Question> <Question attributeName="Email" source="SalesForceApp" type="Application"> <Field application="SalesForceApp" displayName="con_prov_policy_salesforce_direct_Email" helpKey="help_prov_policy_salesforce_direct_Email" name="Question:3:Email" priority="10" required="true" reviewRequired="true" section="SalesForceApp" template="account" type="string" value="Amanda.Ross@eshiam.com"/> </Question> <Question attributeName="FirstName" source="SalesForceApp" type="Application"> <Field application="SalesForceApp" displayName="con_prov_policy_salesforce_direct_FirstName" name="Question:4:FirstName" priority="10" required="true" reviewRequired="true" section="SalesForceApp" template="account" type="string" value="Amanda"/> </Question> <Question attributeName="LastName" source="SalesForceApp" type="Application"> <Field application="SalesForceApp" displayName="con_prov_policy_salesforce_direct_LastName" name="Question:5:LastName" priority="10" required="true" reviewRequired="true" section="SalesForceApp" template="account" type="string" value="Ross"/> </Question> <Question attributeName="TimeZoneSidKey" source="SalesForceApp" type="Application"> <Field application="SalesForceApp" displayName="con_prov_policy_salesforce_direct_TimeZone" name="Question:6:TimeZoneSidKey" priority="10" required="true" reviewRequired="true" section="SalesForceApp" template="account" type="string" value="America/Los_Angeles"> <AllowedValuesDefinition> <Value> <List> <String>America/Chicago</String> <String>America/Bogota</String> <String>America/Lima</String> <String>America/Los_Angeles</String> <String>Atlantic/Bermuda</String> </List> </Value> </AllowedValuesDefinition> </Field> </Question> <Question attributeName="LocaleSidKey" source="SalesForceApp" type="Application"> <Field application="SalesForceApp" displayName="con_prov_policy_salesforce_direct_Locale" name="Question:7:LocaleSidKey" priority="10" required="true" reviewRequired="true" section="SalesForceApp" template="account" type="string" value="en_US"/> </Question> <Question attributeName="LanguageLocaleKey" source="SalesForceApp" type="Application"> <Field application="SalesForceApp" displayName="con_prov_policy_salesforce_direct_LanguageLocaleKey" name="Question:8:LanguageLocaleKey" priority="10" required="true" reviewRequired="true" section="SalesForceApp" template="account" type="string" value="en_US"/> </Question> <Question attributeName="EmailEncodingKey" source="SalesForceApp" type="Application"> <Field application="SalesForceApp" displayName="con_prov_policy_salesforce_direct_EmailEncodingKey" name="Question:9:EmailEncodingKey" priority="10" required="true" reviewRequired="true" section="SalesForceApp" template="account" type="string" value="UTF-8"/> </Question> <Question attributeName="FederationIdentifier" source="SalesForceApp" type="Application"> <Field application="SalesForceApp" displayName="con_prov_policy_salesforce_direct_FederationIdentifier" name="Question:10:FederationIdentifier" priority="10" reviewRequired="true" section="SalesForceApp" template="account" type="string"/> </Question> <Question attributeName="UserType" source="SalesForceApp" type="Application"> <Field application="SalesForceApp" displayName="con_prov_policy_salesforce_direct_UserType" helpKey="help_con_form_salesforce_usertype" name="Question:11:UserType" priority="10" reviewRequired="true" section="SalesForceApp" template="account" type="string"/> </Question> <Question attributeName="AccountName" source="SalesForceApp" type="Application"> <Field application="SalesForceApp" displayName="con_prov_policy_salesforce_direct_AccountName" helpKey="help_con_form_salesforce_accountname" name="Question:12:AccountName" priority="10" reviewRequired="true" section="SalesForceApp" template="account" type="string"/> </Question> </Questions> </ProvisioningProject>
